scripts.cert:install: CAROOT=$(TRUST_STORES=system mkcert -CAROOT) && [ ! -f "$CAROOT/rootCA.pem" ] && TRUST_STORES=system mkcert -install; sudo security add-trusted-cert -d -r trustRoot -k /Library/Keychains/System.keychain "$CAROOT/rootCA.pem" 2>/dev/null || true; mkdir -p certs && [ ! -f certs/localhost.pem ] && (cd certs && TRUST_STORES=system mkcert localhost) || true
scripts.cert:check: mkcert -CAROOT >/dev/null 2>&1 && security find-certificate -c mkcert -a 2>/dev/null | grep -q keychain && echo 'OK' || echo 'NOT INSTALLED'
